sourceTitle: Undergraduate and Graduate Admissions AI Policy: Guidelines for Fall Applicants
evidenceSnippetOriginal: All Fall 2026 applicants must review Caltech's guidelines on the ethical use of AI before submitting their supplemental essays. Failure to comply with the Ethical Use of AI guidelines may result in the rescission of your admission to Caltech.
